top_signals.title: Euro Bears Return as Surging Oil Prices Test Currency’s Rebound
top_signals.summary: Traders are buying insurance against renewed weakness in the euro as climbing crude oil prices threaten last week’s rebound.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: A Catholic Security Scholar’s Case for Responsible Military AI
top_signals.summary:
What do you do when two identities that make up your deepest self find themselves on opposite sides of a moral and spiritual battlefield?I am Catholic. I have been one for over 20 years since I made the life-altering decision to join a friend for Mass one day. My faith became a spiritual and ethical foundation at a time I sorely needed it, so much so that for a time, I contemplated entering the priesthood, which replaced my previous career goal of entering the CIA. I eventually realized that teaching was my true calling and decided to pursue that path

The post A Catholic Security Scholar’s Case for Responsible Military AI appeared first on War on the Rocks.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: TKMS Selected as Preferred Supplier for Canadian Patrol Submarine Project
top_signals.summary: TKMS welcomed the Government of Canada's decision to select Team 212CD as the Preferred Supplier for the Canadian Patrol Submarine Project (CPSP), delivering twelve 212CD submarines. The announcement marks a new chapter in defense cooperation between Canada…
